title: Ingredient entity
description: An ingredient record (DATA-11). Metadata fields (id, slug, name, synonyms, eNumber) are plain scalars. Fact-bearing fields reuse the SourcedValue envelope by $ref (DATA-09). The GB regulatory-position field is marked claimDomain regulatory for the TRUST-06 gate. Ingredient pages are descriptive in v1 (INGR-02): no health-effect synthesis is modelled. Verification and publication status are reserved for the Phase 2 gate (DATA-11).

synonyms.description: Alternative names this ingredient is known by.

eNumber.description: Optional E number where the ingredient is a regulated additive.

functionDescription.description: Fact-bearing: a descriptive account of what the ingredient does, sourced.

regulatoryStatus.description: Fact-bearing regulatory-position field. Marked claimDomain regulatory so the TRUST-06 referential gate (plan 01-05) can key on it.

verificationStatus.description: Derived-only entity status (D-03/R-06): computed from the entity's facts every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.

publicationStatus.description: Derived-only entity status (D-03/R-06): computed from the entity's facts every build, so any author-set value is rejected by Ajv. Only null validates.
